<!-- SEMVER LABEL REQUIRED — add exactly one before merging:

  patch  →  bug fixes, docs, dependency updates
  minor  →  new features, non-breaking enhancements
  major  →  breaking changes, API redesigns

  gh pr edit <number> --add-label "patch"

  The "Semver Label Required" check will block merge until one is added.
  When this PR merges, the label determines the version bump (e.g. 1.2.3 → 1.2.4). -->
